description_long: This is a pair of medium-sized scissors with black plastic handles and metal blades. The handles are asymmetrical, with one loop larger than the other, designed for thumb and finger placement. The blades are straight, slender, and converge to a sharp, pointed tip, suitable for precision cutting. The joint connecting the blades is a visible metal rivet, providing a fixed pivot point. The surface of the handles appears matte and slightly textured for grip, while the blades have a smooth, metallic finish. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of black-handled scissors with pointed metal blades and asymmetrical finger loops, joined by a visible rivet.
description_view_0: Front view showing both finger loops and the full length of the blades, highlighting the asymmetrical handle design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat profile of the scissors, the alignment of the blades, and the thickness of the handles.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the circular shape of the finger loops and the narrowness of the blades.
description_view_3: Edge view showing the thickness of the handles and the slimness of the blades, with the rivet joint visible.
attribute_handle_type: Asymmetrical, ergonomic plastic handles designed for right-handed use, with a matte, slightly textured surface for grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Fixed metal rivet joint, visible and non-adjustable.
attribute_finger_loop_design: One large oval loop for fingers and one smaller round loop for the thumb, both smooth and unpadded.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed tip, designed for precision cutting.
